model.myco_edp.fct_user_churn_actions.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        tags=['daily']
    )
}}

with sq as (
    select
        sk.user_id,
        sc.obs_id,
        sc.obs_time,
        usr.account_id as user_id,
        usr.email_address as email
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }} sc
        inner join
        (
            select
                parent_user_id,
                account_id,
                email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} 
            where 
                user_type='Parent' and account_id is not null
        ) usr
        on sc.parent_user_id=usr.parent_user_id
),

scale_metrics as (
    select 
        user_id,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id) as total_jump_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(obs_time))))) as weekly_jump_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(MONTH from (DATE(obs_time))))) as monthly_jump_obs,
        MIN(obs_time) as user_first_jump_time,
        MAX(obs_time)user_last_jump_time,     
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MIN(obs_time)), DAY) as scale_user_age_days,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MAX(obs_time)), DAY) as scale_inactive_since_days
    from 
        scale
    group by 
        user_id
),

watch as (
    select
        wc.parent_user_id,
        wc.obs_id,
        wc.obs_time,
        usr.account_id as user_id,
        usr.email_address as email
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_activity_walk') }} wc
        inner join
        (
            select
                parent_user_id,
                account_id,
                email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} 
            where 
                user_type='Parent' and account_id is not null
        ) usr
        on wc.parent_user_id=usr.parent_user_id
),

watch_users_metrics as (
    select 
        user_id,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id) as total_watch_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(obs_time))))) as weekly_watch_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(MONTH from (DATE(obs_time))))) as monthly_watch_obs,
        MIN(obs_time) as user_first_watch_time,
        MAX(obs_time)user_last_watch_time,     
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MIN(obs_time)), DAY) as watch_user_age_days,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MAX(obs_time)), DAY) as watch_inactive_since_days
    from 
        watch
    group by 
        user_id
),

engagement_metrics as (
    select 
        account_id as user_id,
        * except (account_id,user_id),
        CASE
            WHEN inactive_since_days between 15 and 21 THEN 'at risk'
            WHEN user_age_days > 14 and inactive_since_days <= 7 and sessions_per_week >= 2 THEN 'valued'
            WHEN user_age_days > 7 and inactive_since_days <= 7 and sessions_per_week < 2 THEN 'active last week'
            WHEN inactive_since_days > 45 THEN 'inactive_45_days'
            WHEN inactive_since_days > 21 THEN 'inactive_21_days'
            WHEN inactive_since_days > 7 THEN 'inactive_7_days'
            ELSE 'new'
        END as user_group
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_user_360_engagement') }}
)

select 
    a.*,
    b.* except (user_id),
    c.* except (user_id)
from
    engagement_metrics a 
    left outer join 
    scale_metrics b 
    on a.user_id=b.user_id
    left outer join 
    watch_users_metrics c
    on a.user_id=c.user_id

model.myco_edp.fct_user_churn_plans_acti.raw_sql:
with scale as (
    select
        usr.email_address,
        sc.obs_id,
        sc.obs_time,
        usr.account_id,
        if(usr.account_id is not null,true,false) is_flutter,
        MIN(obs_time) over (partition by COALESCE(usr.account_id,usr.email_address)) as user_first_jump_time,
        MAX(obs_time) over (partition by COALESCE(usr.account_id,usr.email_address)) as user_last_jump_time
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }} sc
        inner join
        (
            select
                parent_user_id,
                account_id,
                email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} 
            where 
                user_type='Parent'
        ) usr
        on sc.parent_user_id=usr.parent_user_id
),

user_plans_obs_tagged as (
    select
        COALESCE(account_id,email_address) as account_id,
        * except(account_id,email_address),
        DATE_DIFF(obs_time,LAG(obs_time) over (partition by COALESCE(account_id,email_address) order by obs_time),DAY) interval_weigh_in,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(obs_time),DATE(user_first_jump_time),DAY) days_since_joining,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(obs_time),DATE(user_first_jump_time),WEEK(MONDAY)) weeks_since_joining,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(user_first_jump_time),DAY) user_age_days,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(user_last_jump_time),DATE(user_first_jump_time),DAY) inactive_since_days
    from
        scale
)

select
    *
from 
    user_plans_obs_tagged

model.myco_edp.fct_user_churn_session_ac.raw_sql:
with user_sessions_tagged as (
    select
        user_id,
        session_ts,
        session_id,
        engagement_time_msec,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(session_ts),DATE(user_first_event_ts),DAY) days_since_joining,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(session_ts),DATE(user_first_event_ts),WEEK(MONDAY)) weeks_since_joining
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_engagement') }} eng
    where 
        is_authenticated
),

user_info as (
    select 
        account_id,
        gender
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
    where 
        user_type = 'Parent' and account_id is not null
)

select
    sess.*,
    usr.gender
from 
    user_sessions_tagged sess
    left outer join 
    user_info usr 
    ON sess.user_id=usr.account_id

SELECT
    created_ts,
    order_num,
    dispute_id,
    email,
    is_approved,
    is_declined,
    is_refunded,
    product,
    CASE
        WHEN product = "dara scale" THEN "scales"
        WHEN product = "atria watch" THEN "watches"
        WHEN product = "dara black scale" THEN "scales"
        WHEN product = "atria 2.0" THEN "watches"
        WHEN product = "lifetime warranty" THEN "services"
        WHEN product = "beebo scale" THEN "scales"
        WHEN product = "tempo" THEN "watches"
        WHEN product = "atria charger" THEN "watches"
        WHEN product = "atria strap" THEN "watches"
        ELSE "misc"
    END as product_category
FROM
  {{ ref('fct_product__disputes') }},
  UNNEST(products) AS product

model.myco_edp.dim_supprt__messages.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='incremental',
        unique_key='message_id',
        partition_by={
          "field": "created_ts",
          "data_type": "timestamp",
          "granularity": "month"
        },
        tags=["hourly","supprt"]
    )
}}

WITH messages_latest AS (
    SELECT 
        * except(sentiment),
        STRUCT(
            sentiment.score as score,
            sentiment.magnitude as magnitude,
            CASE
                WHEN sentiment.score <= -0.5 THEN "STRONG NEGATIVE"
                WHEN sentiment.score > -0.5 AND sentiment.score <= -0.1 THEN "NEGATIVE"
                WHEN sentiment.score > -0.1 AND sentiment.score <= 0.1 THEN "NEUTRAL"
                WHEN sentiment.score > 0.1 AND sentiment.score <= 0.5 THEN "POSITIVE"
                WHEN sentiment.score > 0.5 THEN "STRONG POSITIVE"
                ELSE "NEUTRAL"
            END AS bucket
        ) as sentiment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY message_id ORDER BY created_ts DESC) row_num
    FROM 
        {{ ref('stg_supprt__messages') }} messages
)

select * from messages_latest where row_num=1

{% if is_incremental() %}
    -- this filter will only be applied on an incremental run
    and created_ts between (select max(created_ts) from {{ this }}) AND '{{ run_started_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") }}'
{% endif %}

model.myco_edp.dim_supprt__tags.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='table',
        unique_key='tag_id',
        partition_by={
          "field": "created_ts",
          "data_type": "timestamp",
          "granularity": "month"
        },
        tags=["daily","costly","supprt"]
    )
}}

/*
can nod do incremental here as tags can change and if we merge old tags will stay
*/

WITH unnested_tags AS (
    SELECT
    ticket_id,
    created_ts,
    updated_ts,
    JSON_VALUE(tag,
      '$.id') AS tag_id,
    JSON_VALUE(tag,
      '$.name') AS tag
    FROM
    {{ ref('stg_supprt__tickets') }}  ,
    UNNEST(tags) AS tag
),
tags AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticket_id,tag_id ORDER BY updated_ts DESC) row_num
  FROM unnested_tags
),
tag_latest AS (
  SELECT
    TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(ticket_id,'-',tag_id))) as tag_id,
    * EXCEPT(row_num,tag_id)
  FROM
    tags
  WHERE row_num = 1
)

select 
  * 
from 
  tag_latest

WITH tags AS (

      '$.name') AS tag

)

WITH surveys AS (
    SELECT 
        TO_BASE64(MD5(CONCAT(ticket_id,survey.created_ts))) as survey_id,

        survey.body_text as text,

)

model.myco_edp.dim_app_users.raw_sql:
with members as (
    SELECT 
        concat(mem.parent_user_id,'~',mem.user_id) as unique_user_id,
        "Member" as user_type,
        mem.parent_user_id,
        acc.auth_id as account_id,
        mem.user_id,
        acc.email_address,
        acc.user_registered_ts,
        acc.user_premium_start_ts,
        acc.user_orig_registered_ts,
        if(acc.auth_id is not null,true,false) as is_flutter,
        if(acc.auth_id is null,true,false) as is_pending_migration,
        if(acc.auth_id is not null 
            and (REGEXP_CONTAINS(mem.parent_user_id,r"^P\d*$") OR 
                    REGEXP_CONTAINS(mem.parent_user_id,r"^\d*$")),true,false) as is_migrated,
        if(REGEXP_CONTAINS(mem.parent_user_id,r"^P\d*$") OR acc.is_pro,true,false) as is_pro,
        if(REGEXP_CONTAINS(mem.parent_user_id,r"^\d*$") AND NOT COALESCE(acc.is_pro,false),true,false) as is_fth,
        acc.is_premium,
        mem.first_name,
        mem.last_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN gender=0 THEN "Male"
            WHEN gender=1 THEN "Female"
            ELSE "Unknown"
        END as gender,
        DATE(TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(birthdate_millis)) as birthday,
        current_jump,
        initial_jump,
        height,
        chest,
        hips,
        waist,
        CASE 
            WHEN app_mode=0 THEN "Standard"
            WHEN app_mode=1 THEN "Athlete"
            WHEN app_mode=2 THEN "Pregnancy"
            ELSE "Not selected"
        END as app_mode,
        CASE 
            WHEN height_unit=1 THEN "centimeteres"
            WHEN height_unit=3 THEN "feet/inches"
            ELSE null
        END as height_unit,
        CASE 
            WHEN skip_unit=0 THEN "celsius"
            WHEN skip_unit=1 THEN "fahrenheit"
            ELSE null
        END as skip_unit,
        CASE 
            WHEN weight_unit=0 THEN "kilograms"
            WHEN weight_unit=1 THEN "pounds"
            WHEN weight_unit=2 THEN "stone"
            ELSE null
        END as weight_unit
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_app__members') }} mem
        INNER JOIN
        {{ ref('stg_app__accounts') }} acc
        ON mem.parent_user_id=acc.parent_user_id
), 
parent_users as (
    SELECT 
        concat(COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id),'~',COALESCE(usr.user_id,acc.parent_user_id)) as unique_user_id,
        "Parent" as user_type,
        COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id) as parent_user_id,
        acc.auth_id as account_uuid,
        COALESCE(usr.user_id,acc.parent_user_id) as user_id,
        acc.email_address,
        acc.user_registered_ts,
        acc.user_premium_start_ts,
        acc.user_orig_registered_ts,
        if(acc.auth_id is not null,true,false) as is_flutter,
        if(acc.auth_id is null,true,false) as is_pending_migration,
        if(acc.auth_id is not null 
            and (REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id),r"^P\d*$") OR 
                    REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id),r"^\d*$")),true,false) as is_migrated,
        if(REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id),r"^P\d*$") OR acc.is_pro,true,false) as is_pro,
        if(REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(usr.parent_user_id,acc.parent_user_id),r"^\d*$") AND NOT COALESCE(acc.is_pro,false),true,false) as is_fth,
        acc.is_premium,
        acc.first_name,
        acc.last_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN gender=0 THEN "Male"
            WHEN gender=1 THEN "Female"
            ELSE "Unknown"
        END as gender,
        DATE(TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(birthdate_millis)) as birthday,
        current_jump,
        initial_jump,
        height,
        chest,
        hips,
        waist,
        CASE 
            WHEN app_mode=0 THEN "Standard"
            WHEN app_mode=1 THEN "Athlete"
            WHEN app_mode=2 THEN "Pregnancy"
        END as app_mode,
        CASE 
            WHEN height_unit=1 THEN "centimeteres"
            WHEN height_unit=3 THEN "feet/inches"
            ELSE null
        END as height_unit,
        CASE 
            WHEN skip_unit=0 THEN "celsius"
            WHEN skip_unit=1 THEN "fahrenheit"
            ELSE null
        END as skip_unit,
        CASE 
            WHEN weight_unit=0 THEN "kilograms"
            WHEN weight_unit=1 THEN "pounds"
            WHEN weight_unit=2 THEN "stone"
            ELSE null
        END as weight_unit
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_app__users') }} usr

model.myco_edp.fct_app_engagement.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='incremental',
        unique_key='session_id',
        partition_by={
          "field": "session_ts",
          "data_type": "timestamp",
          "granularity": "month"
        },
        tags=["daily","events"]
    )
}}

WITH users AS (
  SELECT
    parent_user_id as user_id,
    auth_id as account_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    email_address AS email
  FROM 
      {{ ref('stg_app__accounts') }}
),

sessions_latest_event_info AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    user_pseudo_id,
    session_id,
    session_ts,
    category,
    operating_system,
    operating_system_version,
    mobile_brand_name,
    mobile_marketing_name,
    mobile_model_name,
    mobile_os_hardware_model,
    vendor_id,
    advertising_id,
    extract(hour from timestamp_add(session_ts, INTERVAL time_zone_offset_seconds SECOND)) AS local_hour,
    language AS lang,
    continent,
    sub_continent,
    country,
    region,
    metro,
    city,
    environment AS app_environment,
    build_type AS app_build_type,
    software_version AS app_version,
    is_authenticated,
    is_unknown,
    is_anonymous,
    user_first_event_ts
  FROM
    (select 
      *,
      ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by session_id order by event_ts desc) row_num,
      MIN(event_ts) over (partition by user_id) as user_first_event_ts
    from 
      {{ ref('int_app__actions_full') }} events
    where 
      session_id is not NULL 
    )
  WHERE row_num=1
),

sessions_aggregates AS (
  select 
    session_id,
    min(event_ts) AS first_session_ts,
    max(event_ts) AS last_session_ts,
    TIMESTAMP_DIFF(max(event_ts),min(event_ts),MILLISECOND) AS session_dwell_time_msec,
    sum(engagement_time_msec) AS engagement_time_msec,
    sum(CASE event_name WHEN 'app_exception' THEN 1 else 0 END) AS app_exceptions,
    sum(fatal_exception) AS app_exceptions_fatal,
    sum(CASE event_name WHEN 'app_remove' THEN 1 else 0 END) AS is_app_remove,
    sum(CASE event_name WHEN 'first_open' THEN 1 else 0 END) AS is_first_open,
    sum(CASE event_name WHEN 'screen_view' THEN 1 else 0 END) AS screens_viewed,
    count(distinct firebase_screen) AS screens_viewed_distinct,
    MAX(if(event_name NOT IN UNNEST(["session_start","MyDay_Enter_MyDay","first_open","screen_view","os_update","app_update","app_remove","app_exception","app_clear_data"]),1,0)) AS is_engaged
  from
    {{ ref('int_app__actions_full') }} events
  where 
    session_id is not NULL
    {% if is_incremental() %}
      -- this filter will only be applied on an incremental run
      AND  shard >= (select DATE(max(session_ts)) from {{ this }})
    {% endif %}
  group by 
    session_id
)

SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() as update_ts,
    session_latest.session_id,
    session_latest.* except(session_id),
    session_agg.* except(session_id),
    users.* except(user_id,account_id),
    users.user_id as registered_user_id
FROM 
    sessions_latest_event_info session_latest
    INNER JOIN sessions_aggregates session_agg
      on session_latest.session_id=session_agg.session_id
    LEFT OUTER JOIN users
      on users.account_id=session_latest.user_id

model.myco_edp.rep_user_aging.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='incremental',
        unique_key='update_ts',
        tags=["daily","events"]
    )
}}

WITH
  last_session AS (
  SELECT
CURRENT_DATE() as update_ts,
if(is_flutter,1,0) as users,
if(is_pending_migration,1,0) as pending_migration,
if(is_pending_migration AND is_pro,1,0) as pending_migration_pro,
if(is_pending_migration AND is_fth,1,0) as pending_migration_fth,
if(is_migrated,1,0) as migrated,
if(is_migrated AND is_pro,1,0) as migrated_pro,
if(is_migrated AND is_fth,1,0) as migrated_fth,
if(is_pro,1,0) as pro,
if(is_fth,1,0) as fth,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=7,1,0) as `7`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=14,1,0) as `14`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=30,1,0) as `30`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=60,1,0) as `60`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=90,1,0) as `90`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=182,1,0) as `half`,
IF(is_flutter AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), last_session_ts, DAY)<=365,1,0) as `year`
FROM (SELECT
    COALESCE(users.account_id,users.user_id),
    users.is_flutter,
    users.is_pending_migration,
    users.is_migrated,
    users.is_pro,
    users.is_fth,
    MAX(session_ts) AS last_session_ts
  FROM
    {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} AS users 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN {{ ref('fct_app_engagement') }} AS events
    ON users.account_id = events.user_id
  WHERE 
    users.user_type='Parent'
  GROUP BY
    1,2,3,4,5,6))

select 
    update_ts,
    sum(users) AS users,
    sum(pending_migration) AS pending_migration,
    sum(pending_migration_pro) AS pending_migration_pro,
    sum(pending_migration_fth) AS pending_migration_fth,
    sum(migrated) AS migrated,
    sum(migrated_pro) AS migrated_pro,
    sum(migrated_fth) AS migrated_fth,
    sum(pro) AS pro_users,
    sum(fth) AS fth_users,
    sum(`7`)/sum(users) as `days_7`, 
    sum(`14`)/sum(users) as `days_14`, 
    sum(`30`)/sum(users) as `days_30`, 
    sum(`60`)/sum(users) as `days_60`, 
    sum(`90`)/sum(users) as `days_90`, 
    sum(`half`)/sum(users) as `days_182`, 
    sum(`year`)/sum(users) as `days_365`
FROM last_session
GROUP BY 1

{{

with user_plans_last_obs AS (
    select
        *
    from
        (SELECT 
            parent_user_id,
            user_id,
            obs_time,
            app_version,
            weight,
            STRUCT (
                scale_info.scale_mac_address as device_mac_address,
                scale_info.scale_name as device_name,
                scale_info.scale_hw_info as device_hw_info,
                scale_info.scale_sn as device_sn
            ) as scale_info, 
            phone_info,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (partition by parent_user_id order by obs_time desc) row_num
        FROM 
            {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }}
        WHERE
            scale_mac_address is not null AND scale_mac_address <> 'MANUAL')
    where 
        row_num = 1
),
user_watch_last_obs AS (
    select
        *
    from
        (SELECT 
            parent_user_id,
            user_id,
            obs_time,
            app_version,
            steps,
            distance,
            calories,
            STRUCT (
                watch_info.watch_mac_address as device_mac_address,
                watch_info.watch_name as device_name,
                watch_info.watch_hw_info as device_hw_info,
                watch_info.watch_sn as device_sn
            ) as watch_info, 
            phone_info,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (partition by parent_user_id order by obs_time desc) row_num
        FROM 
            {{ ref('fct_app_activity_walk') }}
        WHERE 
            data_source = 'Watch')
    where 
        row_num = 1
),
users AS (
  SELECT
    parent_user_id,
    account_id,
    email_address AS email
  FROM 
    {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
  WHERE 
    user_type = 'Parent'
)

select 
    devices.parent_user_id as user_id,
    users.account_id,
    users.email,
    ARRAY_AGG(
        STRUCT(
            device_type,
            user_id,
            obs_time,
            app_version,
            measurement,
            phone_info,
            device_info
        )
    ) as device_usage_latest
from
    (
        select 
            *
        from
            (
                select
                    'scale' as device_type,
                    parent_user_id,
                    user_id,
                    obs_time,
                    app_version,
                    weight as measurement,
                    phone_info,
                    scale_info as device_info,
                from

            ) 
            UNION ALL 
            (
                select
                    'watch' as device_type,
                    parent_user_id,
                    user_id,
                    obs_time,
                    app_version,
                    steps measurement,
                    phone_info,
                    watch_info as device_info,
                from 
                    user_watch_last_obs 
            )
    ) devices
    INNER JOIN users
    ON users.parent_user_id=devices.parent_user_id
group by
    1,2,3

model.myco_edp.dim_user_360_engagement.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        tags=['daily']
    )
}}

with user_engaged_actions as (
    select
        user_id as account_id,
        event_name,
        firebase_screen as app_screen,
        count(*) event_count
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_actions') }}
    where
        firebase_screen <> '/' and 
        firebase_screen is not null
    group by 1,2,3
),

user_engaged_actions_ranked as (
    select 
        account_id,
        event_name,
        app_screen,
        event_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by account_id order by event_count desc) as row_num
    from 
        user_engaged_actions
),

user_top_engaged_actions as (
    select 
        account_id,
        ARRAY_AGG(
            STRUCT(
                event_name,
                app_screen,
                event_count
            )
        ) as top_engaged_actions
    from 
        user_engaged_actions_ranked
    where 
        row_num <= 10
    group by 
        1
),

user_demographics as (
    select 
        account_id,
        gender,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),birthday,YEAR) as age,
        COALESCE(user_orig_registered_ts,user_registered_ts) as user_registered_ts
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
    where
        user_type = 'Parent' and account_id is not null
),

user_syncs as (
    select 
        user_id as account_id,
        COUNT(if(event_name in ('scale_receive_data','watch_receive_data'),event_id,null)) as total_syncs,
        COUNT(if(event_name in ('scale_receive_data','watch_receive_data'),event_id,null))/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(event_ts))),EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(event_ts))))) 
                as weekly_syncs
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_actions') }}
    where 
        is_authenticated
    group by 
        1
),

user_engagement_metrics as (
    select
        user_id as account_id,
        MAX(usr.gender) as gender,
        MAX(usr.age) as age,
        MAX(usr.user_registered_ts) as user_registered_ts,
        MAX(registered_user_id) as user_id,
        MAX(email) email,
        COUNT(session_id) as sessions,
        COUNT(session_id)/COUNT(distinct DATE(session_ts)) as sessions_per_day,
        COUNT(session_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(session_ts))),EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(session_ts))))) 
                as sessions_per_week,
        COUNT(session_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(session_ts))),EXTRACT(MONTH from (DATE(session_ts))))) 
                as sessions_per_month,
        SUM(engagement_time_msec)/1000 as total_engagement_time_sec,
        (SUM(engagement_time_msec)/COUNT(session_id))/1000 as engagement_time_per_session_sec,
        (SUM(engagement_time_msec)/COUNT(distinct DATE(session_ts)))/1000 as daily_engagement_time_sec,
        (SUM(engagement_time_msec)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(session_ts))),EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(session_ts))))))/1000
                as weekly_engagement_time_sec,
        (SUM(engagement_time_msec)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(session_ts))),EXTRACT(MONTH from (DATE(session_ts))))))/1000
                as monthly_engagement_time_sec,
        SUM(screens_viewed_distinct)/COUNT(session_id) as screens_per_session,
        MIN(session_ts) as user_first_login_time,
        MAX(session_ts) as user_last_login_time,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MIN(session_ts)), DAY) as user_age_days,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MAX(session_ts)), DAY) as inactive_since_days,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(COALESCE(MIN(user_registered_ts),MIN(session_ts))), DAY) as user_orig_age_days
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_engagement') }}  eng
        left outer join
        user_demographics usr 
        on usr.account_id=eng.user_id
    group by 
        1
)

select
    COALESCE(engagement.account_id,events.account_id) as account_id,
    engagement.* except (account_id),
    events.top_engaged_actions,
    syncs.* except (account_id)
from 
    user_engagement_metrics engagement
    full outer join
    user_top_engaged_actions events
    on engagement.account_id=events.account_id
    left outer join
    user_syncs syncs
    on syncs.account_id=engagement.account_id

model.myco_edp.dim_user_360_plans_trends.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='table'
    )
}}

with scale as (
    select
        sc.parent_user_id,
        sc.obs_id,
        sc.obs_time,
        sc.weight,
        usr.account_id,
        usr.email_address as email
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }} sc
        inner join
        (
            select
                parent_user_id,
                account_id,
                email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} 
            where 
                user_type='Parent'
        ) usr
        on sc.parent_user_id=usr.parent_user_id
),

scale_interval_weigh_ins as (
    select 
        account_id,
        AVG(interval_weigh_in) as avg_interval_weigh_ins_days
    from
        (
            select
                account_id,
                obs_id,
                obs_time,
                DATE_DIFF(obs_time,LAG(obs_time) over (partition by account_id order by obs_time),DAY) interval_weigh_in,
            from 
                scale
        )
    group by 
        1
),

scale_users_metrics as (
    select 
        account_id,
        MAX(parent_user_id) as user_id,
        MAX(email) as email,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id) as total_jump_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(WEEK from (DATE(obs_time))))) as weekly_jump_obs,
        COUNT(distinct obs_id)/
            COUNT(distinct concat(EXTRACT(YEAR from (DATE(obs_time))),
            EXTRACT(MONTH from (DATE(obs_time))))) as monthly_jump_obs,
        MIN(obs_time) as user_first_jump_time,
        MAX(obs_time)user_last_jump_time,     
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MIN(obs_time)), DAY) as scale_user_age_days,
        DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(MAX(obs_time)), DAY) as scale_inactive_since_days
    from 
        scale
    group by 
        account_id
),

scale_jump_rolling_weekly as (
    select
        account_id,
        AVG(weight) as avg_jump_7_days,
        count(obs_id) as obs_count_7_days
    from 
        scale    
    where 
        DATE(obs_time) > DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 8 DAY)
    group by 
        account_id
),

scale_jump_rolling_monthly as (
    select 
        account_id,
        (first_jump - last_jump) as weight_change_30_days,
        MIN(weight) as weight_30_day_low,
        MAX(weight) as weight_30_day_high,
        COUNT(obs_id) as obs_count_30_days
    from 
        (
            select 
                account_id,
                parent_user_id as user_id,
                email,
                obs_time,
                obs_id,
                weight,
                FIRST_VALUE(weight) OVER (partition by account_id order by obs_time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) as first_jump,
                LAST_VALUE(weight) OVER (partition by account_id order by obs_time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) as last_jump
            from 
                scale  
            where 
                DATE(obs_time) > DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 31 DAY)
        ) scale_obs
    group by
        account_id, last_jump, first_jump
     
)

select 
    met.*,
    intervals.* except (account_id),
    weekly.* except (account_id),
    monthly.* except (account_id)
from 
    scale_users_metrics met
    left outer join 
    scale_interval_weigh_ins intervals
    on met.account_id=intervals.account_id
    left outer join 
    scale_jump_rolling_weekly weekly
    on met.account_id=weekly.account_id
    left outer join
    scale_jump_rolling_monthly monthly 
    on met.account_id=monthly.account_id

model.myco_edp.dim_user_360_user_account.raw_sql:
{{
    config(
        materialized='table',
        tags=['hourly']
    )
}}

with 
users AS (
    SELECT 
        * 
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_app_users') }} 
    WHERE
        user_type='Parent'
),

user_latest_session as (
    select DISTINCT
        account_id,
        last_session_ts
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_user_360_event_users_latest') }}
),

user_latest_plans as (
    select
        parent_user_id,
        MAX(obs_time) as last_plans_obs
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }} sc
    group by 
        parent_user_id
),

user_latest_activity as (
    select
        parent_user_id,
        MAX(obs_time) as last_activity_obs
    from
        {{ ref('fct_app_activity_walk') }} act
    group by 
        parent_user_id
)

select
    users.parent_user_id as user_id,
    users.account_id,
    email_address as email,
    users.* except(parent_user_id,user_id,account_id,user_type,email_address),
    FIRST_VALUE(users.parent_user_id) 
        OVER (partition by email_address 
            order by COALESCE(user_registered_ts,user_orig_registered_ts) desc ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) 
    as last_registered_user_id,
    FIRST_VALUE(users.account_id) 
        OVER (partition by email_address 
            order by COALESCE(user_registered_ts,user_orig_registered_ts) desc ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) 
    as last_registered_account_id,
    FIRST_VALUE(users.parent_user_id) 
        OVER (partition by email_address 
            order by COALESCE(latest_sess.last_session_ts,user_registered_ts,user_orig_registered_ts) desc ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) 
    as last_used_user_id,
    FIRST_VALUE(users.account_id) 
        OVER (partition by email_address 
            order by COALESCE(latest_sess.last_session_ts,user_registered_ts,user_orig_registered_ts) desc ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) 
    as last_used_account_id,
    latest_sess.last_session_ts,
    latest_sc.last_plans_obs,
    latest_act.last_activity_obs
from 
    users
    left outer join 
    user_latest_session latest_sess
    on users.account_id=latest_sess.account_id
    left outer join 
    user_latest_plans latest_sc
    on users.parent_user_id=latest_sc.parent_user_id
    left outer join 
    user_latest_activity latest_act
    on users.parent_user_id=latest_act.parent_user_id

with email_campaigns as (

model.myco_edp.fct_user_email_master_lis.raw_sql:
/*
* fct_user_email_master_list
*
* This report serves as a master contact list for email marketing. It generates a single
* record for all users with a myhealth account with a valid email address. A variety of
* attributes are join to the account to aid in segmenting users.
* 
* The fields first_app and current_app were introduced to provide a bit of history for
* users who migrated / transitioned across app versions, and help further separate high 
* and low value dormant accounts (since this report pulls in 1.5M+ records)
*/
{{
    config(
        tags=['daily'],
        labels={'team':'marketing'}
    )
}}
WITH accnt AS (
SELECT 
	parent_user_id,
	account_id,
	is_fth,
	is_flutter,
	is_pending_migration,
	is_migrated,
	user_registered_ts,
	user_orig_registered_ts,
	first_name,
	last_name,
	email_address,
	-- the partitioning de-duplication normally here is moved to the final select
	-- to handle any potential outlier duplicates from the later joins.
FROM
{{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
 WHERE 
	user_type = 'Parent'
	AND email_address LIKE "%@%"
	-- a rudimentary check to filter out the tiny amount of garbage records
),
scales AS (
SELECT
	parent_user_id,
	app_version,
	DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(obs_time),DAY) AS days_since_weigh_in
	FROM (
		SELECT 
			parent_user_id,
			obs_time,
			app_version,
			row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY parent_user_id ORDER BY obs_time desc)  AS row_num
		FROM
		{{ ref('fct_app_plans') }}
	)
	WHERE row_num = 1

),
events AS (
SELECT
    user_id,
	account_id,
	app_version,
	country,
	last_session_ts,
	DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(last_session_ts),DAY) AS days_since_session
FROM
{{ ref('dim_user_360_event_users_latest') }}
),
combined as (
SELECT 
    accnt.parent_user_id,
    accnt.account_id,
    events.user_id AS events_user_id,
    events.account_id AS events_account_id,
	accnt.first_name,
	accnt.last_name,
    accnt.email_address,
    accnt.is_flutter,
    accnt.is_fth,
	COALESCE(events.country, ecomm.address.country, "Unknown") as country,
	COALESCE(events.app_version, scales.app_version, "Unknown") AS app_version,
	if(ecomm.email_address IS NULL, FALSE, TRUE ) AS product_purchased,
	if(pu.product_id LIKE "%.sub%", TRUE, FALSE) AS has_subscription,
    COALESCE(user_registered_ts,user_orig_registered_ts) AS registered_ts,
	events.days_since_session,
	scales.days_since_weigh_in,
	goals.goal_type
FROM accnt
LEFT JOIN
	events
ON 
	accnt.account_id = events.account_id
LEFT JOIN 
	scales
ON 
	accnt.parent_user_id = scales.parent_user_id
LEFT JOIN
{{ ref('dim_ecomm__customers') }} as ecomm
ON
	accnt.email_address = ecomm.email_address
LEFT JOIN 
	`data-17501.myco_analytica_app.fct_app_purchases` AS pu
	-- no dev version of this table
ON 	
	accnt.parent_user_id = pu.user_id
LEFT JOIN
	{{ ref('dim_user_360_goals') }} as goals
ON 
	accnt.account_id = goals.account_id
),
reduce AS (
SELECT 
	*,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY email_address ORDER BY registered_ts desc)  AS row_num
FROM 
	combined
)
SELECT 
CASE
	WHEN regexp_contains(parent_user_id, r"^P\d+$") THEN "PRO"
	WHEN regexp_contains(parent_user_id, r"^\d+$") THEN "FTH"
	ELSE "flutter"
END AS first_app,
CASE 
	WHEN is_flutter THEN "flutter"
	WHEN is_fth THEN "FTH"
	ELSE "PRO"
END AS current_app,
	* EXCEPT(row_num)
FROM reduce 
WHERE row_num = 1

model.myco_edp.rpt_kpi_retention_weekly.raw_sql:
with weekly_user_counts as 
(
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(shard,ISOWEEK) as week,
    DATE_DIFF(shard,
      if(is_premium and shard >= DATE(user_premium_start_ts),
        DATE(user_premium_start_ts),
          DATE(user_first_event_ts)),
      ISOWEEK) as weeks_since_joining,
    if(is_premium and shard >= DATE(user_premium_start_ts),'Paid','Free') as user_subscription,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as user_count
  FROM 
    {{ ref('fct_app_actions') }} events
    left join 
    (
      select 
        account_id,
        is_premium,
        COALESCE(user_premium_start_ts,TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC')) as user_premium_start_ts
      from 
        {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
      where 
        user_type='Parent'
    ) users
    ON users.account_id=events.user_id
  WHERE 
    is_authenticated and
    DATE_DIFF(shard,DATE(user_first_event_ts),ISOWEEK) between 0 and 5
    and date_trunc(shard,ISOWEEK) <> date_trunc(CURRENT_DATE,ISOWEEK)
  group by 
      1,2,3
),

weekly_retention_rates as (
  select 
    week_0.week,
    week_0.user_subscription,
    week_0.user_count as week_0_user_count,
    week_1.user_count as week_1_user_count,
    week_2.user_count as week_2_user_count,
    week_3.user_count as week_3_user_count,
    week_4.user_count as week_4_user_count,
    week_5.user_count as week_5_user_count
    /*(week_0.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_0_retention_rate,
    (week_1.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_1_retention_rate,
    (week_2.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_2_retention_rate,
    (week_3.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_3_retention_rate,
    (week_4.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_4_retention_rate,
    (week_5.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_5_retention_rate,*/
  from 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=0) week_0
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=1) week_1
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_1.week,INTERVAL 7 DAY) and week_0.user_subscription=week_1.user_subscription
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=2) week_2
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_2.week,INTERVAL 14 DAY) and week_0.user_subscription=week_2.user_subscription
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=3) week_3
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_3.week,INTERVAL 21 DAY) and week_0.user_subscription=week_3.user_subscription
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=4) week_4
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_4.week,INTERVAL 28 DAY) and week_0.user_subscription=week_4.user_subscription
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=5) week_5
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_5.week,INTERVAL 35 DAY) and week_0.user_subscription=week_5.user_subscription
)

select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '0' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_0_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '1' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_1_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '2' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_2_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '3' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_3_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '4' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_4_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,user_subscription,
  '5' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_user_count as base_user_count,
  week_5_user_count as week_returned_count
from 
weekly_retention_rates

    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }}
    where 
        DATE(obs_time) between DATE('2017-12-31') and CURRENT_DATE()
),

users as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,

        email_address,
        is_pro,
        is_pro_fresh,

),

    select

    from 
        user_plans_activity scale 
        left outer join 
        users users 
        on scale.parent_user_id=users.parent_user_id
),

monthly_active_users as (
    select
        CASE

        END as user_type,
        DATE_TRUNC(DATE(obs_time),MONTH) as month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT parent_user_id) as active_user_count,

                DATE_TRUNC(DATE(obs_time),MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(DATE(user_first_weigh_in_time),MONTH),
                parent_user_id,null
            )
        ) as new_user_count
    from

    group by 
        1,2
),

    from

*/

monthly_churn_rates as (
    select 
        user_type,
        month,
        active_user_count,
        new_user_count,
        LAG(active_user_count) OVER (partition by user_type order by month) as prev_month_active_user_count,
        (LAG(active_user_count) OVER (partition by user_type order by month) - 
            (active_user_count-new_user_count))
            /LAG(active_user_count) OVER (partition by user_type order by month) as churn_rate
    from 
        monthly_active_users
)

select 
    *
from 
    monthly_churn_rates

model.myco_edp.rpt_upgrade_sync_trends.raw_sql:
with upgrade_actions as (
    select 
        * 
    from 
        {{ ref('rpt_upgrade_actions') }}
    where 
        (is_pro or is_pro_fresh)
),

user_syncs as (
    select 
        account_id,
        MAX(DATE(user_registered_ts)) user_registered_date,
        MAX(is_engaged) as is_engaged,
        IF(COUNT(distinct IF(event_name in ('scale_scan','watch_scan','scale_pair_attempt','watch_pair_attempt'),event_id,null)) > 0,true,false) as is_sync_attempt,
        IF(COUNT(distinct IF(event_name in ('scale_sync_user','watch_sync_user','scale_receive_data','watch_receive_data'),event_id,null)) > 0,true,false) as is_sync_success
    from 
        upgrade_actions
    group by 
        account_id
)

select 
    user_registered_date,
    is_engaged,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(is_sync_success,account_id,null)) as users_sync_success,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(is_sync_attempt,account_id,null)) as users_sync_attempt,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(is_sync_success,account_id,null)),
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(is_sync_attempt,account_id,null))) as pct_sync
from 
    user_syncs
group by 
    1,2

model.myco_edp.rpt_upgrade_onboarding.raw_sql:
with user_accounts as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,
        account_id,
        email_address,
        is_pro,
        is_fth,
        is_flutter,
        user_registered_ts,
        user_orig_registered_ts
    from 
        {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
    where 
        user_type = 'Parent'
),

pro_user_fresh_accounts as (
    select
        pro.email_address
    from 
        (
            select 
                distinct email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
            where 
                user_type='Parent' and is_pro and not is_flutter
        ) pro 
        INNER JOIN 
        (
            select 
                distinct email_address
            from 
                {{ ref('dim_app_users') }}
            where 
                user_type='Parent' and NOT is_pro and NOT is_fth and is_flutter
        ) fresh 
        on pro.email_address=fresh.email_address        
),


weigh_in_activity as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,
        MIN(obs_time) as user_first_jump_time,
        MAX(obs_time) as user_last_jump_time
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }}
    group by
        1
),

watch_activity as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,
        MIN(obs_time) as user_first_activity_time,
        MAX(obs_time) as user_last_activity_time
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_activity_walk') }}
    group by    
        1    
)


select 
    acc.*,
    if(pro_fresh.email_address is not null,true,false) as is_pro_fresh,
    user_first_jump_time,
    user_last_jump_time,
    DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(user_first_jump_time),DAY) as user_age_days,
    DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(user_last_jump_time),DAY) as inactive_since_days,
    DATE_DIFF(DATE(user_last_jump_time),DATE(user_first_jump_time),DAY) as user_retention_days,
    IF(DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(act.user_last_jump_time),DAY) <= 90,true,false) as is_active_last_90_days,
    IF(user_last_jump_time > user_registered_ts OR user_last_activity_time > user_registered_ts,true,false) as is_engaged
from 
    user_accounts acc 
    left outer join 
    pro_user_fresh_accounts pro_fresh 
    on acc.email_address=pro_fresh.email_address
    left outer join 
    weigh_in_activity act 
    on acc.parent_user_id=act.parent_user_id
    left outer join 
    watch_activity steps 
    on acc.parent_user_id=steps.parent_user_id

weigh_in_activity as (

model.myco_edp.rpt_upgrade_retention.raw_sql:
with user_plans_activity as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,
        obs_time,
        MIN(obs_time) OVER (partition by parent_user_id) as user_first_weigh_in_time,
        MAX(obs_time) OVER (partition by parent_user_id) as user_last_weigh_in_time
    from 
        {{ ref('fct_app_plans') }}
),

user_plans_activity_tagged as (
    select 
        scale.*,
        DATE_DIFF(DATE(obs_time),DATE(user_first_weigh_in_time),ISOWEEK) as week_since_joining
    from 
        user_plans_activity scale
),

users as (
    select 
        parent_user_id,
        account_id,
        email_address,
        is_pro,
        is_pro_fresh,
        is_flutter,
        is_engaged,
        is_active_last_90_days
    from 
        {{  ref('rpt_upgrade_onboarding') }} 
),

scale_activity_user_tagged as (
    select 
        scale.*,
        users.* except(parent_user_id)
    from 
        user_plans_activity_tagged scale 
        left outer join 
        users users 
        on scale.parent_user_id=users.parent_user_id
),

user_week_0_counts as (
    select 
        'PRO' as user_type,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) week_0_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged
    WHERE 
        week_since_joining=0 and is_pro and not is_flutter
    group by 
        1
    UNION ALL 
    select 
        'HEALTH' as user_type,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) week_0_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged
    WHERE 
        week_since_joining=0 and is_flutter
    group by 
        1
    UNION ALL 
    select 
        'PRO on HEALTH' as user_type,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) week_0_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged
    WHERE 
        week_since_joining=0 and (is_pro or is_pro_fresh) and is_flutter
    group by 
        1
),

user_weekly_counts as (
    select
        'PRO' as user_type,
        week_since_joining,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) as user_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged scale
    WHERE 
        is_pro and not is_flutter
    group by 
        1,2
    UNION ALL 
    select
        'HEALTH' as user_type,
        week_since_joining,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) as user_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged scale
    WHERE 
        is_flutter
    group by 
        1,2
    UNION ALL 
    select
        'PRO on HEALTH' as user_type,
        week_since_joining,
        count(distinct parent_user_id) as user_count
    from 
        scale_activity_user_tagged scale
    WHERE 
        (is_pro or is_pro_fresh) and is_flutter
    group by 
        1,2
),

user_weekly_retention as (
    select 
        week.user_type,
        week_since_joining,
        user_count/week_0_count as pct_retention
    from 
        user_weekly_counts week 
        INNER JOIN 
        user_week_0_counts week_0 
        on week.user_type=week_0.user_type    
)

select 
    * 
from 
    user_weekly_retention

model.myco_edp.rpt_upgrade_retention_piv.raw_sql:
with weekly_user_counts as 
  (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC(shard,ISOWEEK) as week,
      DATE_DIFF(shard,DATE(user_first_event_ts),ISOWEEK) as weeks_since_joining,
      COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) as user_count
    FROM 
     {{ ref('rpt_upgrade_actions') }}
    WHERE 
      DATE_DIFF(shard,DATE(user_first_event_ts),ISOWEEK) between 0 and 4 
      and date_trunc(shard,ISOWEEK) <> date_trunc(CURRENT_DATE,ISOWEEK)
    group by 
        1,2
  ),

  
weekly_retention_rates as (
  select 
    week_0.week,
    (week_0.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_0_retention_rate,
    (week_1.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_1_retention_rate,
    (week_2.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_2_retention_rate,
    (week_3.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_3_retention_rate,
    (week_4.user_count/week_0.user_count) as week_4_retention_rate,
  from 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=0) week_0
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=1) week_1
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_1.week,INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=2) week_2
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_2.week,INTERVAL 14 DAY)
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=3) week_3
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_3.week,INTERVAL 21 DAY)
    left outer join 
    (select * from weekly_user_counts where weeks_since_joining=4) week_4
    ON week_0.week = DATE_SUB(week_4.week,INTERVAL 28 DAY)
)

select 
  week,
  '0' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_0_retention_rate as retention_rate
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,
  '1' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_1_retention_rate as retention_rate
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,
  '2' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_2_retention_rate as retention_rate
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,
  '3' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_3_retention_rate as retention_rate
from 
weekly_retention_rates
UNION ALL 
select 
  week,
  '4' as weeks_since_joining,
  week_4_retention_rate as retention_rate
from 
weekly_retention_rates

WITH diagno_actions AS (
    select * except (error_type) from {{ source('diagno','com_elink_fittrackhealth_IOS')}} as ios
    UNION ALL
    select * except (error_type) from {{ source('diagno','com_elink_fittrackhealth_pro_ANDROID')}} as android
),

diagno_error_info AS (
  select
    event_id,
    STRUCT(
      JSON_VALUE(error_message,'$.errorCategory') as error_category,
      JSON_VALUE(error_message,'$.errorName') as error_name,
      JSON_VALUE(error_message,'$.deviceName') as device_name,
      JSON_VALUE(error_message,'$.deviceBrand') as device_brand,
      JSON_VALUE(error_message,'$.deviceMacAddress') as device_mac_address
    ) as error_info
  from 
    (
      select 
        event_id,
        MAX(exception.exception_message) as error_message
      from 
        diagno_actions events,
        UNNEST(exceptions) exception
      where 
        JSON_VALUE(exception.exception_message,'$.errorCategory') is not null 
      group by 
        1    
    )
),

diagno_actions_tag_error_info AS (
  select
    events.*,
    errors.error_info
  from 
    diagno_actions events
    LEFT OUTER JOIN
    diagno_error_info errors
    ON events.event_id=errors.event_id
)


SELECT
  *
FROM
  diagno_actions_tag_error_info

	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.total_spent') AS  NUMERIC) AS  total_spent,
	JSON_VALUE(json,'$.note') AS  note,
	JSON_VALUE(json,'$.phone') AS  phone,
	JSON_VALUE(json,'$.tags') AS  tags,
	JSON_VALUE(json,'$.currency') AS  currency,
	STRUCT(
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.address1') as address1,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.address2') as address2,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.city') as city,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.province') as province,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.country_name') as country,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.province_code') as province_code,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.country_code') as country_code,
	    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.default_address.zip') as zip
	) as address,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.tax_exempt') as BOOLEAN) as tax_exempt,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.accepts_marketing') as BOOLEAN) as accepts_marketing
FROM
	 {{ source('landing_estore', 'customers_raw') }}
WHERE
	NOT  test  -- TRUE signifies a test record
),

export_cust AS (
SELECT 
	'orders/history' AS  topic,
	'NA' as domain,
	timestamp('1990-01-01 00:00:00') AS  created_ts,
	timestamp('1990-01-01 00:00:00') AS  updated_ts,
	CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER() as STRING) AS  customer_id,
	Email as email_address,
	First_Name as first_name,
	Last_Name as last_name,
	Total_Orders as orders_count,
	Total_Spent as total_spent,
	Note as note,
	Phone as phone,
	Tags as tags,
	'NA' as currency,
	STRUCT(
	    Address1 as address1,
	    Address2 as address2,
	    City as city,
	    Province as province,
	    Country as country,
	    Province_Code as province_code,
	    Country_Code as country_code,
	    Zip as zip
	) as address,
	Tax_Exempt as tax_exempt,
	Accepts_Marketing as accepts_marketing
FROM
{{ source('landing_estore', 'customers_export') }}
),

customers as (
SELECT  
	*,
	ROW_NUMBER() over(PARTITION BY email_address
		ORDER BY updated_ts DESC, orders_count DESC) AS row_num 
FROM (
	SELECT * FROM raw_cust
	UNION  ALL 
	SELECT * FROM export_cust
	)
)

SELECT 
	* EXCEPT(row_num)
FROM  customers WHERE row_num = 1

model.myco_edp.stg_estore__orders.raw_sql:
with unioned_exports as (
	select           'SFTAU'   as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_au') }}
	union all select 'SHFTCA'  as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_ca') }}
	union all select 'SHFTCA'  as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_de') }}
	union all select 'SHFTDE'  as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_es') }}
	union all select 'SHFTFR'  as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_fr') }}
	union all select 'SHFTIT'  as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_it') }}
	union all select 'SHFTAUS' as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_tna') }}
	union all select 'SFTUK'   as store, * from {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_export_uk') }}
),

-- CTE final exports
final_exports as (
SELECT 
	store,
	id AS order_id,
	name AS order_name,
	email AS email_address,
	-- the datetimes have a trailing +1000 artifact e.g. '2021-09-09 14:13:47 +1000' to discard
	-- exports are missing an updated_at field; copying created_at serves the right purpose
	'orders/updated' AS topic,
	timestamp(substr(created_at, 0, 19)) AS created_ts,
	timestamp(substr(created_at, 0, 19)) AS updated_ts,
	timestamp(substr(cancelled_at, 0, 19)) AS cancelled_ts,
	timestamp(substr(fulfilled_at, 0, 19)) AS fulfilled_ts,
	
	fulfillment_tatus AS fulfillment_status,
	financial_status,
	
	CAST(subtotal AS numeric) AS order_subtotal,
	CAST(total AS numeric) AS order_total,
	currency,
	
	CAST(NULL AS bool) AS shipping_required,
	CAST(shipping AS numeric) AS shipping_cost,
	
	accepts_marketing,
	source AS source_name,
	tags,
	notes,
	note_attributes,
	
	lineitem_name,
	lineitem_sku,
	CAST (lineitem_price AS NUMERIC) AS lineitem_price,
	CAST (lineitem_quantity AS NUMERIC) AS lineitem_quantity,
	CAST (lineitem_taxable AS bool) AS lineitem_taxable,   -- todo: sort this one out
	lineitem_product_status,
	CAST (lineitem_discount AS NUMERIC) AS lineitem_discount_amount,
	CAST (NULL AS string) AS lineitem_discount_code,
	CAST (NULL AS string) AS lineitem_vendor,
	
	struct(
		shipping_name AS full_name,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS first_name,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS last_name,
		shipping_company AS company,
		shipping_address1 AS address1,
		shipping_address2 AS address2,
		shipping_city AS city,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS province,
		shipping_province AS province_code,
		CAST(NULL AS string)  AS country,
		shipping_country AS country_code,
		shipping_zip AS zip,
		shipping_phone AS phone
	) AS shipping_address,
	
	struct(
		billing_name AS full_name,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS first_name,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS last_name,
		billing_company AS company,
		billing_address1 AS address1,
		billing_address2 AS address2,
		billing_city AS city,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS province,
		billing_province AS province_code,
		CAST(NULL AS string) AS country,
		billing_country AS country_code,
		billing_zip AS zip,
		billing_phone AS phone
	) AS billing_address,

	tax1_name,
	CAST(tax1_value AS NUMERIC) AS tax1_value,
	tax2_name,
	CAST(tax2_value AS NUMERIC) AS tax2_value,
	tax3_name,
	CAST(tax3_value AS NUMERIC) AS tax3_value,
	tax4_name,
	CAST(tax4_value AS NUMERIC) AS tax4_value,
	tax5_name,
	CAST(tax5_value AS NUMERIC) AS tax5_value
FROM unioned_exports
),

-- CTE extract_json_sub_elements
extract_json_sub_elements AS (
SELECT
	topic,
	DOMAIN,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.name') AS order_name,
	JSON_EXTRACT(json, '$.id') as order_id,
	created_at AS created_ts,
	updated_at AS updated_ts,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json, '$.cancelled_at') AS timestamp) AS cancelled_ts,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json, '$.fulfilled_at') AS timestamp) AS fulfilled_ts, 
	JSON_EXTRACT(json, '$.shipping_address') AS ship_addr_json,
	JSON_EXTRACT(json, '$.billing_address') AS bill_addr_json,
	JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(json, '$.discount_applications')  AS discount_applications_json,
	JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(line_item, '$.discount_allocations') AS discount_allocations_json,
	JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(line_item, '$.tax_lines') AS tax_lines_json,
	json,
	line_item
FROM {{ source('landing_estore', 'orders_raw') }},
UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(json, '$.line_items')) as line_item
),

-- CTE final_orders_raw
final_orders_raw AS (
SELECT
	regexp_extract(order_name, r'^[^#]*') as store,
	order_name,
	order_id,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.contact_email') AS email_address,
	topic,
	created_ts,
	updated_ts,
	cancelled_ts,
	fulfilled_ts,
	
	/* applies to the order as a whole */
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.fulfillment_status') AS fulfillment_status,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.financial_status') AS financial_status,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json, '$.subtotal_price') AS NUMERIC) AS order_subtotal,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(json, '$.total_price') AS NUMERIC) AS order_total,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.currency') AS currency,
	
	-- shipping required
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.requires_shipping') AS bool) as shippig_required,
	-- shipping cost (total toder)
	if(array_length(json_query_array(json, '$.shipping_lines')) > 0,
	CAST(json_value(json_query_array(json, '$.shipping_lines')[offset(0)],'$.price') AS NUMERIC),
	null) as shipping_cost,
	
	-- additional customer fields
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.buyer_accepts_marketing') AS accepts_marketing,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.source_name') as source_name,
	JSON_VALUE(json, '$.tags') as tags,
	
	json_value(json, '$.note') as notes,
	array_to_string(json_query_array(json, '$.note_attributes'), " ") as note_attributes,
	
	/* per line item */
	JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.title') AS lineitem_name,
	JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.sku') AS lineitem_sku,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.price') AS NUMERIC) AS lineitem_price,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC) AS lineitem_quantity,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.taxable') AS bool) as lineitem_taxable,	
	JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.fulfillment_status') as lineitem_product_status,
		
	/*
	regarding line item discount and terminology used
	- 'allocations' hold info on the value of the discount and a reference to discount details
	- 'applications' hold info on the speific types of discount use by this line item
	*/
	
	CASE 
		WHEN array_length(discount_allocations_json) = 0
		THEN 0.0 
		ELSE CAST(JSON_VALUE(discount_allocations_json[offset(0)], "$.amount") AS NUMERIC)
	END 
	AS lineitem_discount_amount,
	--	
	CASE 
		WHEN array_length(discount_allocations_json) = 0
		THEN NULL
		ELSE 
		JSON_VALUE(discount_applications_json[
			offset( CAST( JSON_VALUE(discount_allocations_json[offset(0)], "$.discount_application_index") AS int ))
			], "$.code")
	END 
	AS lineitem_discount_code,
	
	JSON_VALUE(line_item, '$.vendor') as lineitem_vendor,
 	-- the shipping address
	STRUCT(
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.name')          AS full_name,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.first_name')    AS first_name,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.last_name')     AS last_name,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.company')       AS company,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.address1')      AS address1,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.address2')      AS address2,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.city')          AS city,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.province')      AS province,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.province_code') AS province_code,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.country')       AS country,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.country_code')  AS country_code,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.zip')           AS zip,
		JSON_VALUE(ship_addr_json, '$.phone')         AS phone
	) AS shipping_address,

 	-- the billing address
	STRUCT(
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.name')          AS full_name,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.first_name')    AS first_name,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.last_name')     AS last_name,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.company')       AS company,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.address1')      AS address1,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.address2')      AS address2,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.city')          AS city,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.province')      AS province,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.province_code') AS province_code,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.country')       AS country,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.country_code')  AS country_code,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.zip')           AS zip,
		JSON_VALUE(bill_addr_json, '$.phone')         AS phone
	) AS billing_address,
	
	/* 
	re. taxes
	- we handle up to 5 different taxes being applied to a line item
	*/
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 0, 
	concat(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(0)], '$.title'), " ", JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(0)], '$.rate')), NULL ) AS tax1_name,
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 0,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(0)], '$.price') AS NUMERIC), NULL)  AS tax1_value,
	-- tax #2
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 1, 
	concat(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(1)], '$.title'), " ", JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(1)], '$.rate')), NULL) AS tax2_name,
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 1,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(1)], '$.price') AS NUMERIC), NULL) AS tax2_value,
	-- tax #3
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 2, 
	concat(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(2)], '$.title'), " ", JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(2)], '$.rate')), NULL) AS tax3_name,
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 2,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(2)], '$.price') AS NUMERIC), NULL) AS tax3_value,
	-- tax #4
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 3, 
	concat(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(3)], '$.title'), " ", JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(3)], '$.rate')), NULL) AS tax4_name,
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 3,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(3)], '$.price') AS NUMERIC), NULL) AS tax4_value,
	-- tax #5
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 4, 
	concat(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(4)], '$.title'), " ", JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(4)], '$.rate')), NULL) AS tax5_name,
	if(array_length(tax_lines_json) > 4,
	CAST(JSON_VALUE(tax_lines_json[offset(4)], '$.price') AS NUMERIC), NULL) AS tax5_value
FROM extract_json_sub_elements
),

-- CTE combine_export_raw
combine_export_raw as (
SELECT *           FROM final_exports
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM final_orders_raw
),

-- CTE order_ranked
order_ranked as (
SELECT
	*,
	dense_rank() OVER(PARTITION BY store, order_name order by updated_ts DESC) AS dense_rank_num
FROM combine_export_raw
WHERE topic = 'orders/updated'
)

SELECT * except(dense_rank_num) FROM order_ranked
WHERE dense_rank_num = 1
model.myco_edp.stg_estore__orders.name: stg_estore__orders

model.myco_edp.stg_disputes__master.raw_sql:
WITH master_data AS (
    SELECT
        dispute_id,
        created_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_1) = "YES", True, False) as is_30days,
        string_field_2 AS order_num,
        string_field_3 AS email,
        string_field_4 AS discount_code,
        string_field_5 AS requested_method,
        split(lower(string_field_6),", ") AS products,
        SPLIT(string_field_7,r", ") AS attachments,
        null AS attachment_notes,
        string_field_8 AS platform,
        null AS application,
        lower(string_field_9) AS reason,
        string_field_10 AS defect_type,
        string_field_11 AS customer_note,
        string_field_12 AS country,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_13 AS BOOL) AS is_approved,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_14 AS BOOL) AS is_declined,
        string_field_15 AS internal_note,
        IF(upper(string_field_16) = "Y", True, False) AS is_refunded,
        string_field_17 AS amount,
        PARSE_TIMESTAMP("%m/%d/%Y", string_field_18) AS refunded_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_20) = "Y", True, False) AS is_uploaded
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_disputes_en') }}
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT
        dispute_id,
        created_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_1) = "JA", True, False) as is_30days,
        string_field_2 AS order_num,
        string_field_3 AS email,
        null AS discount_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "erstattung" THEN "refund"
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "erstattung" THEN "replacement"
            ELSE lower(string_field_4)
        END
            AS requested_method,
        ARRAY(SELECT 
            CASE
                WHEN lower(x) = "dara-waage" THEN "dara scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria watch"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "dara black scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "atria 2.0" THEN "atria 2.0"
                WHEN lower(x) = "lebenslange garantie" THEN "lifetime warranty"
                WHEN lower(x) = "beebo-waage" THEN "beebo scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "tempo"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria charger"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria strap"
                ELSE lower(x)
            END
            FROM UNNEST(split(lower(string_field_5),", ")) AS x) AS products,
        SPLIT(string_field_6,r", ") AS attachments,
        string_field_7 AS attachment_notes,
        if(lower(string_field_8) = "sonstiges", null, lower(string_field_8)) AS platform,
        if(lower(string_field_9) = "sonstige", null, lower(string_field_9)) AS application,
        CASE
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "ich habe mich anders entschieden" THEN "i've change my mind"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "defektes produkt" THEN "defective product"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "produkt hat erwartungen nicht erfüllt" THEN "did not meet expectations"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "sonstiges" THEN "others"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "produkt nicht erhalten" THEN "did not receive"
            ELSE lower(string_field_10)
        END AS reason,
        "na" AS defect_type,
        string_field_11 AS customer_note,
        "DE" AS country,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_12 AS BOOL) AS is_approved,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_13 AS BOOL) AS is_declined,
        string_field_14 AS internal_note,
        IF(upper(string_field_15) = "Y", True, False) AS is_refunded,
        string_field_16 AS amount,
        PARSE_TIMESTAMP("%m/%d/%Y", string_field_17) AS refunded_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_19) = "Y", True, False) AS is_uploaded
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_disputes_de') }}
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT
        dispute_id,
        created_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_1) = "SI", True, False) as is_30days,
        string_field_2 AS order_num,
        string_field_3 AS email,
        null AS discount_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "rimborso" THEN "refund"
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "sostituzione" THEN "replacement"
            ELSE null
        END
            AS requested_method,
        ARRAY(SELECT 
            CASE
                WHEN lower(x) = "bilancia dara" THEN "dara scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria watch"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "dara black scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "atria 2.0" THEN "atria 2.0"
                WHEN lower(x) = "lebenslange garantie" THEN "lifetime warranty"
                WHEN lower(x) = "beebo-waage" THEN "beebo scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "tempo"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria charger"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria strap"
                ELSE lower(x)
            END
            FROM UNNEST(split(lower(string_field_5),", ")) AS x) AS products,
        SPLIT(string_field_6,r", ") AS attachments,
        string_field_7 AS attachment_notes,
        if(lower(string_field_8) = "sonstiges", null, lower(string_field_8)) AS platform,
        if(lower(string_field_9) = "sonstige", null, lower(string_field_9)) AS application,
        CASE
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "aspettative non rispettate" THEN "did not meet expectations"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "prodotto difettoso" THEN "defective product"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "prodotto danneggiato" THEN "damaged product"
            ELSE lower(string_field_10)
        END AS reason,
        "na" AS defect_type,
        string_field_11 AS customer_note,
        "IT" AS country,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_12 AS BOOL) AS is_approved,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_13 AS BOOL) AS is_declined,
        string_field_14 AS internal_note,
        IF(upper(string_field_15) = "Y", True, False) AS is_refunded,
        string_field_16 AS amount,
        PARSE_TIMESTAMP("%m/%d/%Y", string_field_17) AS refunded_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_19) = "Y", True, False) AS is_uploaded
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_disputes_it') }}
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT
        dispute_id,
        created_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_1) = "SI", True, False) as is_30days,
        string_field_2 AS order_num,
        string_field_3 AS email,
        null AS discount_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "reembolso" THEN "refund"
            WHEN lower(string_field_4) = "reemplazo" THEN "replacement"
            ELSE null
        END
            AS requested_method,
        ARRAY(SELECT 
            CASE
                WHEN lower(x) = "bascula dara" THEN "dara scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria watch"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "dara black scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "atria 2.0" THEN "atria 2.0"
                WHEN lower(x) = "lebenslange garantie" THEN "lifetime warranty"
                WHEN lower(x) = "bascula beebo" THEN "beebo scale"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "tempo"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria charger"
                WHEN lower(x) = "----" THEN "atria strap"
                ELSE lower(x)
            END
            FROM UNNEST(split(lower(string_field_5),", ")) AS x) AS products,
        SPLIT(string_field_6,r", ") AS attachments,
        string_field_7 AS attachment_notes,
        if(lower(string_field_8) = "sonstiges", null, lower(string_field_8)) AS platform,
        if(lower(string_field_9) = "sonstige", null, lower(string_field_9)) AS application,
        CASE
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "aspettative non rispettate" THEN "did not meet expectations"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "producto defectuoso" THEN "defective product"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "producto dañado" THEN "damaged product"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "otros" THEN "others"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "no lo recibí" THEN "did not receive"
            WHEN lower(string_field_10) = "he cambiado de opinión" THEN "i've change my mind"
            ELSE lower(string_field_10)
        END AS reason,
        "na" AS defect_type,
        string_field_11 AS customer_note,
        "ES" AS country,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_12 AS BOOL) AS is_approved,
        SAFE_CAST(string_field_13 AS BOOL) AS is_declined,
        string_field_14 AS internal_note,
        IF(upper(string_field_15) = "Y", True, False) AS is_refunded,
        string_field_16 AS amount,
        PARSE_TIMESTAMP("%m/%d/%Y", string_field_17) AS refunded_ts,
        IF(upper(string_field_19) = "Y", True, False) AS is_uploaded
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_disputes_es') }}
)

SELECT 
    * EXCEPT(reason),
    CASE
        WHEN reason = "i've change my mind" THEN "needs"
        WHEN reason = "ordered the wrong product" THEN "wrong order"
        WHEN reason = "damaged droduct" THEN "damages"
        WHEN reason = "defective product" THEN "defects"
        WHEN reason = "did not meet expectations" THEN "expectations"
        WHEN reason = "others" THEN "others"
        WHEN reason = "did not receive" THEN "shipment"
        ELSE "other"
    END AS reason
FROM
    master_data

model.myco_edp.stg_supprt__messages.raw_sql:
WITH messages AS (
    SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.id') AS message_id,
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.ticket_id') AS ticket_id,
    timestamp(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.created_datetime')) as created_ts,
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.channel') as channel,
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.via') as integration,
    NOT CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.from_agent') AS BOOLEAN) AS is_from_user,
    CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.public') AS BOOLEAN) AS is_public,
    if(ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(json,'$.attachments'))>0,true,false) AS has_attachment,
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.subject') as subject,
    JSON_VALUE(json,'$.body_text') as body_text,
    JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(json,'$.intents') as intents,
    STRUCT(
        CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.nlp.sentiment.documentSentiment.score') AS FLOAT64) as score,
        CAST(JSON_VALUE(json,'$.nlp.sentiment.documentSentiment.magnitude') AS FLOAT64) as magnitude
    )
     as sentiment
    
    FROM
    {{ source('landing_supprt','messages_raw')}}
)
select * from messages
model.myco_edp.stg_supprt__messages.name: stg_supprt__messages
